overview.description: Outsourced software development partner specialising in product discovery, custom software, and AI/agentic systems for US-based startups and scaleups
overview.description_long: OAK'S LAB is a Prague-based software development partner founded in 2016 by Czech-American brothers Jake and Theo Dluhy-Smith. The company deploys autonomous product teams (product managers, designers, tech leads, engineers, QA) for fast-growing US companies, covering product discovery & design, full-stack JavaScript development, and AI & agentic systems including LLMs, RAG pipelines, and AI orchestration. Bootstrapped and profitable, the firm has built 65+ products whose clients have raised over $200M combined.
overview.tagline: High-performing outsourced software teams for scaling companies

history.origin_story: Czech-American brothers Jake and Theo Dluhy-Smith moved to Prague in 2016 to bridge American tech entrepreneurship with elite Czech engineering talent, building entirely without investor funding.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague; first client product launched; OAK'S LAB WAY methodology established
First client product acquired; Bill Gates highlighted a product they built on Twitter; moved to Old Town Square office
First client product reached Series A; launched business development department; 20 software products delivered
Clutch top company Czech Republic award; established early-stage investment arm; team expanded to 70 members
Clutch top company Czech Republic award; 40 products built; startup client portfolio exceeded $1B valuation
Clutch Champion & Global Winner awards; featured at TechCrunch Disrupt and Startup Grind Global; expanded to enterprise clients
Refined service pillars to Product Discovery, Custom Software Development, and Agentic AI Systems; clients raised over $200M; strong FinTech presence in New York

financials.revenue_source: Bootstrapped; reported to generate hundreds of millions CZK in annual revenue (ment2grow.com profile of CEO)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: As a software development services firm, OAK'S LAB faces real risk from AI-assisted coding tools (Copilot, Cursor, Devin) commoditising developer labour. However, they are actively pivoting into AI/agentic systems delivery and their value proposition relies on project management, product strategy, and client trust — dimensions not easily replaced. The shift to AI delivery services partially offsets the risk.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Established demand for outsourced product teams from US tech companies is proven and growing; OAK'S LAB has 65+ delivered products, 89% client retention, and a 4.9/5 Clutch rating. The US-to-Prague talent arbitrage model remains attractive given US hiring costs.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Fully bootstrapped with reported hundreds of millions CZK in annual revenue, meaning no reliance on external investors or runway concerns. The business has been self-sustaining since 2016.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Strong financials and market position are offset by medium-term disruption risk as AI coding tools reduce the cost advantage of nearshore engineering. The company is adapting by offering agentic AI systems, but it remains a services business whose unit economics will be challenged as AI productivity tools mature.

metadata.notes: Category in companies_index.json is 'research_group' but OAK'S LAB is clearly a commercial software development consultancy, not a research group. Consider reclassifying to 'company'. Glassdoor URL found (E4425208, 17 reviews) but rating not visible in search snippet — direct access blocked.
